channel.title: GRSM Early Access RSS
channel.description: IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Magazine Early Access articles from 2026-06-01 to the current run date.

item.title: Evaluating Machine Learning Emulators for Atmospheric Radiative Transfer: The Atmospheric Machine Learning Emulation Challenge
item.category: IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Magazine Early Access
item.description:
Jorge Vicent Servera, Jasdeep Singh, Axel Rochel, Julio Cesar Contreras Huerta, Romain Poirier, Panagiotis Liatsis, Hasan Al Marzouqi, Gustau Camps-Valls
IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Magazine, pp. 2-15
DOI: 10.1109/mgrs.2026.3703170
item.source: IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Magazine Early Access

item.description:

item.source: IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Magazine Early Access
